raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Dr. Margot Kushel has identified temporary housing with family or friends as a critical tool to help prevent more Californians from becoming homeless.",
    "Dr. Margot Kushel has received a $30 million grant from Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff, the largest-ever private donation to fund homelessness research.",
    "Dr. Kushel and her team will conduct research on the root causes of homelessness and identify evidence-based solutions to prevent and end homelessness.",
    "AB 1188 will remove legal barriers and provide tenants with greater flexibility to assist friends or loved ones in a time of desperate need.",
    "AB 1188 provides a legal framework that will incentivize both landlords and tenants to assist persons at risk of homelessness.",
    "AB 1188 will provide shelter and an opportunity for vulnerable individuals to save resources and regroup while searching for more stable housing.",
    "Housing with family is one solution to expand the options to get homeless individuals stabilized while they seek permanent housing.",
    "AB 1188 aims to formalize arrangements that reduce the risk of eviction for families who host homeless loved ones."
  ]
}
```
